title: Big Music Festival in Sunderland with Famous DJs
summary: A big music festival called Radio 1's Big Weekend is coming to Sunderland in May. On the first day, famous DJs Fatboy Slim and Sonny Fodera will be the main performers. They play fun dance music that people love. Other musicians like FISHER, Clementine Douglas, and MK will also perform. The festival happens in Herrington Country Park over three days. Tickets went on sale, and local people got to buy them first. Fatboy Slim is known for hits like Praise You. The festival is for music fans to enjoy live shows. More performers will be announced later. Kids can go with adults on some days.

background_read: Radio 1's Big Weekend is a music festival organized by BBC Radio 1, a popular radio station in the UK. It happens every year in different cities, featuring many artists and DJs. Festivals are fun events where people gather to listen to live music, dance, and enjoy time with friends. DJs like Fatboy Slim play electronic dance music that gets crowds excited. Tickets are sold so people can enter the festival, and sometimes there are rules about who can attend based on age. This year, it's in Sunderland, a city in northeast England.
Article_Structure: WHO: DJs Fatboy Slim, Sonny Fodera, and other performers like FISHER and Clementine Douglas
WHAT: A music festival called Radio 1's Big Weekend with dance music and live shows
WHERE: Herrington Country Park in Sunderland, England
WHY: To entertain music fans with performances from popular artists and DJs

perspectives.description: Excited to see famous DJs and enjoy a fun festival with friends
